label: 第167話
source_locator: 単行本19巻 目次 p.107
summary_short: 日車は処刑人の剣を止め、虎杖へ得点を譲って得点移動の規則追加に協力する。一方、伏黒とレジィの交渉は決裂する。
summary_full: 日車は処刑人の剣を虎杖へ突き立てる直前に解除し、戦いを止める。法の不完全さに苦しみながらも虎杖の罪悪感を理解した日車は、100点を使って総則10を追加し、泳者間で得点を移せるようにする。さらに虎杖へ1点を譲り、術式剥奪までの期限を延ばす。日車は自分の殺人と向き合うため単独で去る。一方、伏黒はレジィ一派との交渉を拒絶し、戦闘へ入る。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 日車 ultimately agrees to put his 100 points toward 悠仁 's cause, making it possible for players to transfer points between one another. While things are progressing well for 悠仁, 恵 's negotiations with other 死滅回游 players break down completely.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 日車 decides to go off alone after granting 悠仁's request. 日車 tells his コガネ to add a rule to the 死滅回游 that allows players to transfer points between one another. He's sure to mention that it must affect the score calculation surrounding 術式 removal as well. 悠仁 anxiously waits as コガネ relays the message to the game master but just moments later the new rule is approved. He breathes a sigh of relief and 日車 transfers one of his points to 悠仁 so neither of them will be affected by 術式 removal for nineteen days. 日車 walks toward the theater exit and says goodbye but 悠仁 asks him what he's going to do now. 悠仁 wants 日車 to use his strength to help them combat the 死滅回游 but the lawyer explains that he killed a judge and prosecutor before coming to 東京. He feels the need to take responsibility and plans to turn himself in once the barrier opens. For the time being, he's going to ponder his course of action and doesn't feel comfortable staying around 悠仁 because it'll just make him hate himself more. 日車 leaves the theater and 悠仁 is alone lamenting the situation despite accomplishing his goal. " 羂索 will drop a bomb when only the strong remain.. and then the 死滅回游 will have served its purpose ". Meanwhile, レジィ commends 恵 and says he can tell the young man is strong just based on his 式神 . Unbeknownst the 麗美 , レジィ was using her to lure in potential allies and would simply eliminate them if they weren't worth more than their points. レジィ wants 恵 to join their group and asks how much he knows about the 死滅回游. Without mentioning 天元様 , 恵 reveals that it's a ritual for bringing Japanese people to the other side so they're no longer human. レジィ reacts by laughing and asks if 恵 knows 羂索 , surprising him. 恵 figured he'd run into a sorcerer with a connection to 羂索 sooner or later and this exchange confirms it. レジィ explains that the ritual explanation is probably just a cover for 羂索's real plan. He has three main reasons for believing this isn't 羂索's main goal: the number of players, the difference in skill levels between the players, and the rules of the game. Assuming one thousand players were equally divided among ten colonies, レジィ suggests that each colony of a hundred players is top-heavy in regard to player skill level. Players like 鹿紫雲一 and 日車 are much stronger than most of the other players. Between the two of them, they have eliminated roughly sixty other players within twelve days. 恵 states he'll only join レジィ if his group hands over all their points. This rationalization makes sense to 恵 so far because the 東京第1結界 has been quiet ever since he entered it. He asks レジィ if the strong weeded out all the weak early on and if the game will reach a deadlock soon. レジィ confirms this has already occurred in both the 東京 colonies. He reveals that the transferal process isn't just a way to spread out players, but a way to stimulate a second awakening of modern-day sorcerer's cursed techniques. Some even die during that transfer but this doesn't benefit the ritual the same way a drawn-out melee would. 羂索 is overseas in China meeting with government officials. レジィ is certain that 羂索 will drop a metaphorical bomb on all the players once only the strongest ones remain. At that point, レジィ believes the 死滅回游 will have served its purpose. He's unsure of what this revelation could possibly be, so レジィ is focused on gathering allies and storing points for any eventuality. Negotiations break down and レジィ's group ambushes 恵. 恵 asks how 麗美 fits into this plan because she is a weakling with no value. レジィ clarifies that 麗美 is useful for luring in people because they felt their guards down around a woman. 恵 asks if レジィ will eliminate her for points once he's finished using her but レジィ denies this and 麗美 claims he's her true knight. 恵 tells her that must be nice, mostly ignoring her. He asks レジィ if the total points of everyone in his group combine to at least one hundred. レジィ confirms that they have over a hundred points total and 恵 reveals that a new rule will be added that allows players to give each other points. He demands that レジィ and his allies hand over all their points and only then will he consider joining them. " If you don't fight to kill... you'll wind up dead. " レジィ immediately declares that their negotiation has broken down. Another player named 針千鈞 promptly appears behind 恵 and tries to attack him with his set of claws. 恵 disappears by slipping into Hari's shadow. While 玉犬: 渾 attacks レジィ, 恵 picks up Hari and throws him over the side of the building. Then he commands 鵺 to divebomb him, shocking the player and slamming him into the ground below. 麗美 realizes that 恵 has had 鵺 patroling this entire time and the 呪術高専 student glares back at her, warning the girl to never let him see her face again. Suddenly, two kitchen knives are shoved into 玉犬's mouth, incapacitating the 式神. 恵 turns back around and is surprised to see that レジィ is unscathed while his 式神 is whimpering on the ground. レジィ knows that 恵 is holding back because he wants their points and warns his adversary that he'll die if he doesn't fight for real. On cue, a detached eye suddenly falls over the side of the building next to Meguumi and abruptly detonates into an explosion.

candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: Cursed 術式 針千鈞's Claw 術式 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬: 渾 鵺 玉犬: 渾 鵺 式神 コガネ

key_events_verified_phase9: 日車が虎杖の処刑を中止する
総則10として得点移動が追加される
日車が虎杖へ1点を譲渡する
日車が単独行動を選ぶ
伏黒とレジィ一派の戦闘が始まる
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
